warning: Copy all the network info from the League Power section.

burning.title: Burn Calculator
burning.subtitle:
💡Paste the data to calculate your points. The data is calculated automatically, so it may vary slightly.

You can copy the data from:
● Marketplace
● Marketplace Sell
● Inventory
● Collection

💡 Click on cards to select/deselect miners and sum their points.
burning.empty: Paste miners data and click Calculate
burning.maintenanceSubtitle: It will be available in a few minutes...

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.beta_notice: Beta Version: This feature is under development. If you find any bugs or have suggestions, please let me know on Telegram or Discord: ar1el_23
rooms.description:
Optimize the distribution of your miners and racks to maximize your mining power.
You can copy the data from:
● Collection ● Inventory ● Sell
rooms.warning_temp_power: The calculated power does not include temporary power, freon, hamsters or other types of temporary bonuses.
rooms.warning_room_delay: Room power in the game may take a few minutes to update. To see it instantly, check Profile Stats.
rooms.ai_network_desc: Import your rooms configuration from RollerCoin's network data
rooms.ai_screenshot_desc: Import your rooms from screenshots using image recognition
rooms.ai_help_hint: Not sure about a step? Click {?} for help
rooms.ai_step6: Only one result will appear → Right-click on it → Copy → Copy response
rooms.ai_help1: Open the RollerCoin game page in your browser. Make sure you are logged in to your account.
rooms.ai_help2:
There are several ways to do this:
• Right-click anywhere on the page → click "Inspect" or "Inspect Element"
• Or press F12 on your keyboard
• Or press Ctrl+Shift+I (Windows) / Cmd+Option+I (Mac)
A panel will open at the bottom or side of your browser.
rooms.ai_help3: In the panel that just opened, look for the "Network" tab at the top. If you don't see it, click the >> arrows to show more tabs. Click on "Network".
rooms.ai_help4:
Reload the page so the network activity is recorded. You can do this by:
• Pressing F5 or Ctrl+R on your keyboard
• Or clicking the refresh button in your browser
rooms.ai_help5: In the Network panel, there is a filter/search box at the top. Click on it and type "room-" (with the dash). This will filter the results.
rooms.ai_help6: After filtering, only one result will appear (it may show an ID like "62a014..." instead of a name — that's normal). Right-click on that result → select "Copy" → then "Copy response".
rooms.ai_help7: Go back to this page, paste the copied data in the text box below, and click the IMPORT button.
rooms.set_power_note: This power is added in the game as temporary power
rooms.temp_bonus_tooltip: Temporary bonus not counted for league promotion (freon, hamsters, etc.)
rooms.racks_power_tooltip: Total extra power contributed by racks with bonus applied to the miners inside them.
rooms.edit_miner_desc: Only edit if the miner data is incorrect. Changes are saved locally and sent to the developer for review.
rooms.save_changes: Do you want to save the changes made during simulation?
rooms.confirm_deactivate: Deactivating this room will remove all miners and racks placed in it. Continue?
rooms.confirm_clear_rooms: This will empty all rooms. Miners and racks will return to the list. Continue?
rooms.confirm_clear: This will reset everything: all rooms, miners and racks will be removed. Continue?
rooms.auto_description: Automatically finds the best distribution of miners and racks across all your active rooms to maximize power.
rooms.select_miners: SELECT THE MINERS TO ADD TO THE ROOM
rooms.click_or_drag_miners: CLICK OR DRAG MINERS TO ADD TO THE ROOM
rooms.select_miners_note: Changing the manual mode will apply the miners to the room automatically
rooms.click_or_drag_racks: CLICK OR DRAG RACKS TO ADD TO THE ROOM
rooms.no_miners: No miners loaded. Import your collection first.
rooms.empty_room: Empty room. Add miners and racks from the right panel.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle_sell: Paste your miners from the Sell section in RollerCoin to see their details and quickly access the marketplace.
marketplace.subtitle_buy: Paste miners from the Marketplace buy page to compare prices and ratios.
marketplace.empty_sell: Paste miners data from the Sell section and click LOAD
marketplace.empty_buy: Paste miners data from the Marketplace and click LOAD
